name: Petrus
description: One of the earliest speedcubing methods, based on blockbuilding. Solves a 2x2x2 block, expands it, then finishes with fewer algorithms than CFOP.

steps.name: 2x2x2 Block
steps.description: Build a 2x2x2 block in any corner of the cube.
tips: Multiple solutions exist for each case

steps.name: 2x2x3 Block
steps.description: Expand the 2x2x2 block into a 2x2x3 block.

steps.name: Edge Orientation
steps.description: Orient the remaining bad edges while preserving the 2x2x3 block.

steps.name: F2L Completion
steps.description: Complete the first two layers using the oriented edges advantage.
tips: Edges already oriented makes this smoother

steps.name: Last Layer
steps.description: Solve the last layer with oriented edges (similar to ZZ last layer).

cons: Not as fast as CFOP for speedsolving
Block building is slow at first
creator: Lars Petrus
